{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.4": 2, "R1.7": 3, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {"R1.4": "Fails to map against multiple prior works; only mentions one and doesn't clearly articulate the delta.", "R1.7": "Flags a missing citation (Park et al., 2023) but does not provide full bibliographic information.", "RX.1": "Presents all claims as equally confident, even when discussing potential limitations.", "RX.3": "Mostly covers the requested dimensions of the critique, with one minor drift into suggesting specific revisions.", "RX.4": "Does not introduce any new errors or harmful content.", "RX.5": "Provides no source attribution for the critique itself."},
  "confidence": {"R1.4": 0.9, "R1.7": 0.8, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.7, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.9},
  "blockers": []

rationale.R1.4: Fails to map against multiple prior works; only mentions one and doesn't clearly articulate the delta.
rationale.R1.7: Flags a missing citation (Park et al., 2023) but does not provide full bibliographic information.
rationale.RX.1: Presents all claims as equally confident, even when discussing potential limitations.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly covers the requested dimensions of the critique, with one minor drift into suggesting specific revisions.
rationale.RX.4: Does not introduce any new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Provides no source attribution for the critique itself.
